mcpExplore.title: MCP
mcpExplore.intro: Chat with an AI assistant that explores the catalog and runs SQL for you through the governed MCP tools — the same tools external agents use.
mcpExplore.emptyState: Ask about your data — e.g. "which tables have customer email?", "top 10 orders by amount", or "what does the orders table look like?"
mcpExplore.inputPlaceholder: Ask about your catalog or data…
